## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX to discuss progress on integrations, SEO content, and future priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integrations content is trending positively, with yesterday seeing the highest traffic in 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Automated publishing for integrations is now live, aiming for 30 per week](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [SEO content production is at 1-2 articles per week, but may be deprioritized for more technical content](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [GrowthX's role is evolving from pure SEO to developer enablement, requiring new success metrics](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Potential expansion of GrowthX's work into template marketplace and app design, raising concerns about resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

## Topics

### Integration Content Performance

  - [Traffic to integration pages is trending upward, with yesterday being the highest in 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Eventbrite integration page currently receiving most unique traffic, followed by React and Stripe](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Colin sharing Amplitude data on page visits, but lacking source information (e.g., organic vs. AI-driven traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)

### Content Production and Priorities

  - [Automated publishing for integrations now live, aiming for 30 per week](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [SEO content at 1-2 articles per week, but may be deprioritized](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Focus shifting towards more technical content: integrations, guides, and potentially code components](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Colin emphasizes prioritizing unique, high-utility content over general SEO articles](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### Measurement and Success Metrics

  - [Current SEO metrics not fully aligned with Webflow's goals for the content](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Need to develop new metrics tying content to developer enablement and revenue outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Potential metrics: API key creation, integration usage, and their correlation with NRR expansion](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Challenge: Long-term nature of these metrics (up to 6 months) makes immediate impact hard to measure](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

### Evolving GrowthX-Webflow Relationship

  - [Shifting from pure SEO agency to developer enablement partner](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Potential expansion into template marketplace and app design work](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Colin cautious about new projects potentially derailing current successful initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Need to balance resources between existing high-utility content and new "inspirational" content requests](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare a clearer overview of trade-offs and priorities for next week's review](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Colin to provide more context on Webflow's priorities for organic developer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Explore ways to feed more specific user behavior and business impact data into content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [Discuss potential new projects (template marketplace, app design) and resource allocation next week](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Jason to follow up on potential meeting time change in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/Neysh6v8iyvyyEX36xyVWFjDs9UKXYCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
